parents.subject: LU-18813 osd-wbcfs: implement basic sysfs/debugfs support

commit.subject: LU-18715 tests: Fix sanity-sec 25 and 25a
commit.message:
LU-18715 tests: Fix sanity-sec 25 and 25a

Sanity-sec 25a misses a test case for "lctl get_param -R
nodemap.*.ranges", which this patch adds.

Further, sanity-sec 25 is renamed to 25a, and 25a renamed to 25b.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-sec env=ONLY="25a 25b"
Fixes: b8e3b427f4 ("LU-18715 utils: Extend lctl nodemap_info with property values")
Signed-off-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I693b44585c1cc0ae17666eaa623f873708ef00f4
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/60138
Reviewed-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
